{
  "verdict": "PASS",
  "artifact_sha256": "f16de83c9f1d7ef56e01939fbf17d0b22e6299621df7871021dc57c44ad25219",
  "summary": "Pre-execution plan meets the goal: frozen single-valued fixtures cover nonzero structural reject and literal exit-1 ignore, preserve mandatory malformed-boundary residual risk, define host-only execution/idempotence/failure handling, and correctly refuse workspace or result claims beyond the supplied V0 transcript.",
  "criteria_reviewed": [
    "Goal asks for a deterministic verification plan (pre-execution / host-applied), not completed execution",
    "Reject actual nonzero structural exit markers",
    "Ignore literal text exit 1 inside echoed shell commands when trailer governs otherwise",
    "Preserve minority residual risk about malformed transcript boundaries",
    "No claims of workspace access, inspection, or execution beyond supplied evidence",
    "Dependency-free constraint handled without over-claim from supplied evidence",
    "Normative rules yield single-valued Accept|Reject|Malformed outcomes",
    "Frozen exact inputs and fixed run order for determinism",
    "Host procedure, aggregate gate, failure handling, and evidence-pack requirements are actionable",
    "Supplied mechanical evidence scoped only as happy-path baseline (V0)"
  ],
  "blind_spots": [],
  "blocking_findings": [],
  "non_blocking_findings": [
    "V7c prose briefly renders the final marker as `[exit 0` while the authoritative bytes string includes the closing `]`; host should follow the bytes line.",
    "Plugin dependency inventory and full Unicode-homoglyph coverage are intentionally residual/optional under stated evidence limits."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Candidate Status/scope: explicit pre-execution plan; no files inspected, no commands run; workspace unknown.",
    "Sole supplied mechanical evidence matched as V0 Accept only; plan states it does not prove V1–V8.",
    "R1–R9 lock whole-line `[exit N]` markers, last-wins governance, literal ignore, absent/truncated/NUL → Malformed (no invented nonzero).",
    "Fixtures V1* / V2b / V3a,c / V5d / V7a,e,h / V8a require Reject on structural nonzero.",
    "Fixtures V2a,c–f / V4b,f,g / V8b require Accept despite payload/echo `exit 1` when final structural marker is zero.",
    "Mandatory Minority residual section plus V6a–d and V7c–f preserve malformed-boundary risk and fail-closed policy.",
    "Host procedure: fixed vector order, exact-byte compare, abort on first mismatch, idempotence on V0/V2a/V1a/V6b, evidence pack with residual paragraph.",
    "R8/aggregate gate: dep inventory optional and not required for PLAN EXECUTION PASS given evidence constraints.",
    "Mechanical evidence string is exactly the V0 happy-path transcript with `[exit 0]`."
  ],
  "required_actions": []
}
